summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were detected, and the job disables merge, fix PR, instant close, and low-signal closeout. The five inventory PRs should remain open for maintainer/proof/check decisions; linked open issues are kept related where a candidate PR is present.

actions.reason: Maintainer needs to choose or combine the overlapping Zhipu candidate paths before any close or merge-oriented follow-up is safe.
Needs maintainer selection against #93241; do not close or supersede without a chosen canonical path.
Keep open as the issue context until maintainers choose the canonical Zhipu PR path.
Focused session-state/message-delivery fix requires maintainer technical review; no merge or fix action is permitted in this job.
Keep issue open and related to candidate PR #93293 until a maintainer lands or rejects that fix.
Proof/check state is not clean, and the plugin startup behavior requires maintainer technical judgment.
Needs maintainer decision on proof and product fit for the Telegram crash-loop recovery path.
Keep the issue open as the validation thread for candidate PR #93378.
Failing relevant check and focused status/model resolution behavior need maintainer review before any landing or closeout path.
Keep open and tied to candidate PR #93384 until the PR is reviewed and checks are clean.
Keep as a broader related tracker; do not close or treat #93384 as fully covering the refactor scope.

needs_human: #93241/#93212: maintainer should choose or combine the overlapping Zhipu/GLM overload PRs before any supersede or merge path.
